title: Node.get_neighbors returns hardcoded RSSI -100 for all peers
description:
**Location:** python/src/lichen/node.py:551-565

**Risk:** The `get_neighbors()` method returns `'rssi': -100` for every peer (line 563 comment: 'no per-peer RSSI tracking yet'). Applications or UIs that display neighbor quality will show all neighbors as equally weak.

**Trigger:** Any call to `get_neighbors()` or the CoAP /neighbors resource.

**Bad behavior:** Users cannot distinguish between strong and weak neighbors. Link quality metrics are useless.

**Maintainer burden:** Users will report 'RSSI always shows -100' as a bug.

**Note:** This is a known limitation (ponytail comment), but there's no tracking issue or TODO in the codebase.
